description: Assess 'logistics sprawl' in San Francisco by identifying warehouse/logistics candidate buildings. Using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/logistics_assessment.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, identify buildings with non_residential_sqft >= 40,000 that have either 0 jobs or a non_residential_sqft/jobs ratio >= 1,000. Aggregate these candidates by zone_id to determine the candidate count and total logistics square footage per zone. Export the results to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/logistics_zones.csv (sorted by total_logistics_sqft descending with columns: zone_id, candidate_buildings_count, total_logistics_sqft) and a summary JSON to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/logistics_summary.json (keys: total_citywide_logistics_sqft, total_candidate_buildings, top_zone_id, top_zone_sqft). Save a bar chart of the Top 15 zones titled 'Top 15 Zones for Urban Logistics Activity' to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_logistics_zones.png. Ensure the notebook is fully executed.
